meaning: adj.皮下的,皮下注射用的,皮下组织的n.皮下注射
examples: As he reached over, Azrak slid a hypodermic syringe into his left arm.
He held up a hypodermic to check the dosage.
Hypodermic needles stuck in my shoes as I walked over to take the photo.
She wasn't above running, butting, bumping, or dragging me if she spotted a hypodermic.
These include global-positioning devices, the drug atropine and seven-inch hypodermic needles, used to inject atropine to resuscitate heart-attack victims.
